---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to happen?

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, links, or whether this exists in
[`checklist`](https://github.com/niclaslindstedt/checklist) and could be
ported via the `copy-feature` skill.
